message:
test(extensions): fix edit tool camelCase params + linter fixups; sync beads

- Fix dispatcher_tool_edit_modifies_file_content: old_text→oldText, new_text→newText
  (EditTool uses #[serde(rename_all = "camelCase")])
- Linter auto-fixes: .clone() on MutexGuard, method ownership in assertions
- Sync beads with bd-6vcm progress comment (61 dispatcher tests total)
- Include other agents' changes: auth, error handling, provider tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
